name: Mince and Eggplant Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 oz TVP® mince or 2 veg burgers, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a casserole dish.
3. Peel the eggplants using a veg peeler and cut into strips.
4. Cook the eggplant in boiling water for about 5 minutes until tender, then drain.
5. Melt margarine in a large saucepan and sauté onion and green pepper (if using) for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add TVP® mince and stir over low heat for about 3 minutes.
7. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, and seasoning. Allow to simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. If a moist sauce is desired, add a little vegetable stock or water.
9. Spread a layer of eggplant on the bottom of the casserole dish.
10. Add a layer of the mince/tomato mixture, then a layer of grated cheese.
11. Alternate these layers until all ingredients are used.
12. End with a layer of cheese.
13. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes, until the cheese forms a golden crust.
Good source of protein, vitamin A, C, calcium. From Linda McCartney's Home Cooking, Typed by Lisa Greenwood.
